titles.title: This World Is Not My Home

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: This world is not my home I'm just a passing through My treasures are laid up Somewhere beyond the blue. The angels beckon me From heaven's open door And I can't feel at home In this world anymore.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Oh Lord you know, I have no friend like you If heaven's not my home Then Lord what will I do? The angels beckon me From heaven's open door And I can't feel at home In this world anymore.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: They're all expecting me And that's one thing I know I fixed it up with Jesus Many years ago. I know He'll see me through Tho' I am weak and poor And I can't feel at home In this world anymore.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: I have aloving mother Up in gloryland I don't expect to stop Until I shake her hand She's waiting now for me In heaven's open door And I can't feel at home In this world anymore.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Just up in gloryland, We'll live eternally; The saints on every hand Are shouting "victory". The songs of sweetest praise Drift back from heaven's shore And I can't feel at home In this world anymore.
